message.content: Two side-by-side lunar maps show the Moon’s albedo on the left and a faint water signature near the north pole, indicated by a blue arrow, on the right.
message.reasoning_content: The user wants a one-sentence description of the image. The image shows two side-by-side spherical maps of the Moon: the left labeled "Albedo" with bright/dark surface features, and the right labeled "Water Signature" mostly dark with a faint signature and a blue arrow pointing to a highlighted area near the north pole. I should describe this concisely in one short sentence.
